meta.status: DRAFT — NOT ACTIVE (may be imported in UI; re-import after item-propagation fix)
meta.purpose: Extend provisional v4 polling to mrhz1973/control-plane, mrhz1973/dev-method, and mrhz1973/cursor-coordinate-converter with separate Data Table keys per repo. Enables criterion 3 end-to-end notifica on product repos (Cycle 2 dev-method 5ce0a25 currently missing Telegram because runtime v4 polls control-plane only).
meta.redaction: No token, no operational chat_id, no credential id, no workflow id, no webhook secret are committed.
meta.runtimeStatus: Template/export record only. NOT imported into n8n. NOT executed. active=false. Do not activate until UI gate: manual test all three repos, then schedule.
meta.stateStore: Uses n8n Data Table control_plane_state with per-repo keys: github:mrhz1973/control-plane:last_commit_sha, github:mrhz1973/dev-method:last_commit_sha, github:mrhz1973/cursor-coordinate-converter:last_commit_sha.
meta.dedupe: Per-repo SHA compare; Telegram only when latest SHA differs from stored value for that repo key; upsert after send path.
meta.firstRunBehavior: On first import, seed Data Table rows or expect one Telegram per repo whose latest SHA differs from empty stored value — plan manual test inactive before enabling schedule to avoid surprise spam.
meta.polling: 1 minute schedule (same as v4). Does not satisfy strict 30s SLA; webhook remains separate gate.
meta.itemPropagationFix: 2026-05-20 — Prepare/Format/Duplicate skip: runOnceForEachItem + .item; Decide: run-once-for-all-items over Prepare.all() after full state load.
meta.missingStateRowFix: 2026-05-20 — Load all state rows + Decide join; missing key => storedValue '' => isNew true.
meta.stateLoadExecutionOrderFix: 2026-05-20 — Sequential only: Trigger → Data Table - Load all state rows → Emit watched repos (3) → GitHub → Prepare → Decide. No parallel Trigger→Emit. No intermediate nodes between Load all and Emit.
meta.controlPlaneStateTableObserved: 2026-05-20 UI: control_plane_state has only github:mrhz1973/control-plane:last_commit_sha; dev-method key absent — commit 5ce0a25 should isNew=true after fix.
meta.thirdManualTestImportedDraft: 2026-05-20 — Prepare 3 items (incl. dev-method 5ce0a25); Decide failed: 'Data Table - Load all state rows' hasn't been executed. Load all not on sequential path to Decide (parallel trigger wiring in imported copy).
meta.secondManualTestImportedDraft: 2026-05-20 — Telegram only control-plane; per-item Get dropped missing keys (fixed by load-all).
meta.nextGate: Re-import draft with sequential state-load fix (inactive). Manual Trigger: Load all → gate → Emit 3 → Decide 3 → Telegram dev-method 5ce0a25 if new. Active v4 unchanged.
meta.replacesOrExtends: Intended to extend/replace active v4 only after UI validation — not a second parallel production workflow.
